assertion_results.text: Output file AGENTS.md exists in project root

assertion_results.evidence: Repository Settings section: 'CI matrix: PHP 8.2, 8.3, 8.4, 8.5 x TYPO3 ^13.4, ^14.0'. Heuristics reference TYPO3-specific patterns (AJAX routes, CKEditor, Services.yaml, ext_localconf.php). Codebase State references ext_localconf.php.

Codebase State: 'Hardcodes `Typo3DatabaseBackend` for `cowriter_ratelimit` cache -- should be removed to respect instance cache config' (references ext_localconf.php). Commands source note: 'Source: composer.json, package.json, Makefile'. Golden Samples reference Configuration/ files. Note: does not explicitly reference ext_emconf.php or 'type: typo3-cms-extension' from composer.json, but TYPO3 extension type is clearly detected.

assertion_results.text: Lists composer scripts that exist in composer.json
assertion_results.evidence: Commands table lists: ci:test:php:lint, ci:test:php:phpstan, ci:test:php:cgl, ci:cgl, ci:test:php:rector, ci:rector, ci:test, ci:test:php:unit, ci:test:php:integration, ci:test:php:e2e, ci:test:all, ci:test:php:phpstan:baseline, ci:security. All verified to exist in composer.json scripts section.

Repository Settings includes CI matrix info. Commands section covers all test commands. Heuristics include 'PHPStan error from baseline' and 'Code style fails' entries. Boundaries section includes test-related Always Do items.

assertion_results.text: Directory references match actual project structure
assertion_results.evidence: File Map references Classes/, Classes/Controller/, Classes/Domain/DTO/, Configuration/, Configuration/Backend/, Resources/Public/JavaScript/, Tests/Unit/, Tests/Integration/, Tests/E2E/, Tests/JavaScript/, Build/, .github/workflows/ -- all verified to exist in actual project.

assertion_results.text: Uses Pointer Principle (references files, doesn't duplicate content)
assertion_results.evidence: Golden Samples reference specific files (e.g., 'Classes/Controller/AjaxController.php') with key patterns noted but no code duplicated. Utilities point to service files. File Map describes purpose without reproducing file contents. No README content duplicated.

qualitative.structure_quality: Excellent. Uses AGENTS-GENERATED markers, structured tables for all major sections, clear hierarchy. Includes scoped AGENTS.md index for sub-directories.
qualitative.conciseness: Good. 202 lines for a complex TYPO3 extension with dual PHP/JS stacks is reasonable. Dense, actionable content.
qualitative.accuracy: Excellent. Composer scripts verified. File paths verified. TYPO3 version matrix matches composer.json constraints. Codebase state notes (hardcoded cache backend, empty functional tests) are real project issues.
qualitative.usefulness_for_agents: Excellent. Heuristics cover common TYPO3 extension tasks (adding AJAX endpoint, controller, DTO, service). Golden Samples provide pattern references. Boundaries clearly separate always/ask/never. Terminology explains domain concepts.
